title: Sick-Day Spicy Venezuelan Bamboo Shoot Toast
description: A spicy, snappy pescatarian-friendly dish featuring bamboo shoots, perfect for a sick day.

ingredients.name: Bamboo shoots
ingredients.notes: Canned or fresh, sliced into 1-inch pieces.

ingredients.name: Spicy harissa mayo
ingredients.notes: Homemade or store-bought, adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: Minced garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince fresh or use pre-minced from jar.

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lime
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed or bottled, adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: For toasting bread or saut4ing garlic.

instructions: Toast the bread slices until lightly browned, or use untoasted if preferred.
In a small bowl, mix together harissa mayo, grated queso fresco, chopped cilantro, minced garlic, lime juice, salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes until smooth.
Arrange toasted bread slices on a plate, and top each slice with a spoonful of the spicy harissa mayo mixture.
Top with sliced bamboo shoots and drizzle with olive oil, if desired.
